get.description:
Returns the current SSOT state (Portfolio + Replay + Stage).
Used by PC to pull from OCI, or OCI to verify PC state.

post.description:
Updates the local SSOT state from a snapshot.
Protected by strict token validation (P151 Token Unification).
Pulls SSOT from OCI and applies it to Local PC.

Pushes Local SSOT (Portfolio + Replay) to OCI.
Requires Ops Token for security.

P150: 1-Click Sync (Bundle Push).
Generates Strategy Bundle dynamically from Current Params, saves it locally,
and pushes the new Strategy Bundle + Params to OCI.

post.description: app/generate_contract5_report.py 실행 (Ops/Reco/OrderPlan 취합)

티켓 생성 (TICKET_SUBMIT_V1 → TICKET_REQUEST_V1 변환 후 저장)

규칙:
- request_id, requested_at, status는 서버가 강제 주입
- Append-only: 수정/삭제 금지
티켓을 IN_PROGRESS 상태로 전이 (State Machine)
티켓을 DONE 또는 FAILED 상태로 전이 (State Machine)

Gate 모드 변경

Transition Rule:
- MOCK_ONLY <-> DRY_RUN: 허용
- Any -> MOCK_ONLY: 즉시 허용 (Emergency Stop)
- Any -> REAL_ENABLED: 400 Bad Request (C-P.4에서 금지)
Emergency Stop 상태 변경 (enabled=true면 Gate를 MOCK_ONLY로 강제)
REAL_ENABLED 승인 요청 생성 (PENDING 상태, keys=[])
승인에 Key 추가 (2개 충족 시 APPROVED)

P162: Submit Execution Record — Draft-as-SSOT.
Loads the server-side draft file, copies ticket_id/idempotency_key/items
directly, and writes the final record. DRY_RUN/REPLAY structurally cannot
produce TOKEN_MISMATCH. If BLOCKED, returns HTTP 409 (not 200).
